ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the film production company */,
  "number_of_movies" INTEGER /* Total number of movies produced by the company */,
  "total_gross" REAL /* Total gross revenue of the company */,
  "total_budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the company's movies */,
  "mean_gross" REAL /* Average gross revenue per movie */,
  "mean_budget" REAL /* Average budget per movie */,
  "mean_score" REAL /* Average score of movies produced by the company */,
  "mean_runtime" REAL /* Average runtime of movies produced by the company */,
  "mean_relative_revenue" REAL /* Average relative revenue of movies produced by the company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "headquarters_location" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the company's official website */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees working for the company */,
  "primary_genre" TEXT /* Primary genre of films produced by the company */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the company */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company that produced the film */,
  "film_title" TEXT /* Title of the film */,
  "gross" REAL /* Gross revenue generated by the film */,
  "budget" REAL /* Production budget of the film */,
  "score" REAL /* Critical score of the film */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the film in minutes */,
  "relative_revenue" REAL /* Relative revenue calculated from gross revenue and budget */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the film was released */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the film was produced */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the film */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the film's director */,
  "producer_name" TEXT /* Name of the film's producer */,
  "writer_name" TEXT /* Name of the film's writer */,
  "main_actors" TEXT /* JSON array of main actors in the film */,
  "production_company_name" TEXT /* Name of the production company (for redundancy) */,
  "distributor_name" TEXT /* Name of the film's distributor */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification of the film */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline of the film */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* Brief synopsis of the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gross_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gross report */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film related to this report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the gross revenue report */,
  "gross_amount" REAL /* Gross revenue reported on this date */,
  "report_source" TEXT /* Source of the gross report */,
  "report_period" TEXT /* Period covered by the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gross_reports_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget report */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film related to this report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of budget report */,
  "budget_amount" REAL /* Budget amount reported on this date */,
  "report_source" TEXT /* Source of the budget report */,
  "report_period" TEXT /* Period covered by the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_reports_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "score" REAL /* Score given by the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the reviewer */,
  "review_source" TEXT /* Source of the review */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review */,
  "spoiler_flag" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review contains spoilers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_reviews_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award entry */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film that won the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award */,
  "won" INTEGER /* Indication of whether the film won (true) or was nominated (false) */,
  "award_source" TEXT /* Source of the award */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "nominated_by" TEXT /* Name of the person or organization that nominated the film */,
  "nominated_date" TEXT /* Date the film was nominated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_awards_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film version */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of the version (e.g., Theatrical, Director's Cut) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of this version */,
  "is_director_cut" INTEGER /* Indicates whether this version is a Director's Cut */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_format" TEXT /* Format of the version */,
  "distribution_channels" TEXT /* JSON array of distribution channels */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_versions_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "box_office_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film being analyzed */,
  "opening_weekend_gross" REAL /* Gross revenue generated in opening weekend */,
  "total_gross" REAL /* Total gross revenue of the film */,
  "gross_vs_budget_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of gross revenue to production budget */,
  "domestic_gross" REAL /* Domestic gross revenue */,
  "international_gross" REAL /* International gross revenue */,
  "total_tickets_sold" INTEGER /* Total number of tickets sold */,
  "average_ticket_price" REAL /* Average ticket price */,
  "screen_count" INTEGER /* Number of screens the film was shown on */,
  "theater_count" INTEGER /* Number of theaters the film was shown in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_box_office_analysis_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the performance metrics */,
  "annual_gross" REAL /* Gross revenue for the film in that year */,
  "annual_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the film in that year */,
  "cumulative_gross" REAL /* Cumulative gross revenue of the film up to that year */,
  "domestic_annual_gross" REAL /* Domestic gross revenue for the film in that year */,
  "international_annual_gross" REAL /* International gross revenue for the film in that year */,
  "total_tickets_sold" INTEGER /* Total number of tickets sold in the year */,
  "average_ticket_price" REAL /* Average ticket price in the year */,
  "screen_count" INTEGER /* Number of screens the film was shown on in the year */,
  "theater_count" INTEGER /* Number of theaters the film was shown in the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_performance_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)
